title: Ashok Leyland is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ashok Leyland is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Ashok Leyland invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ashok Leyland:
Ashok Leyland is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ashok Leyland!
